institution.name: New River Community and Technical College

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at New River Community and Technical College fell 41% between 2006 and 2009 (22.1% → 13.1%).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at New River Community and Technical College rose 33% between 2021 and 2024 ($7.2k → $9.6k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at New River Community and Technical College rose 12% between 2021 and 2024 ($4.6k → $5.2k).

flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at New River Community and Technical College rose 12% between 2017 and 2020 ($6.5k → $7.2k).
